audio_description: The audio features a woman speaking with a clear and steady voice, accompanied by the sound of a train approaching in the background.
temporal_description: A person with long dark hair, wearing a blue outfit, is partially buried in snow, positioned in front of a wooden structure with a window. Their hands are visible, moving slightly as they appear to be struggling or adjusting their position. The scene transitions to a man with shoulder-length hair, wearing a red jacket over a plaid shirt, standing in a hallway with floral wallpaper and a round mirror on the wall. He is holding an object in his right hand and looking forward with a slight smile.
